heading: Acquisition of land for field sites
label: 278c Acquisition of land for field sites
text: To the extent that funds are specifically appropriated therefor, the Secretary of Commerce is authorized to acquire land for such field sites as are necessary for the proper and efficient conduct of the activities authorized herein.
notes: References in Text“Herein”, referred to in text, refers to , which is classified generally to this chapter.act Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 872
